parsed_review.summary: CP00-217 is a clean descriptor-only fixture-binding-slice pack (risk B, 40 units, RP06.P05.M04.S13-RP06.P05.M06.S08) and the pack-level claim is fully supported. Coverage is internally consistent across review-baseline.json, the closeout plan (CP00-217 present), DMS_CORE_CP217_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS/NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js), the code-generated case set and descriptor (service.js), the validators (validators.js), tests (test/model.test.js sourced from the real closeout plan), the read-only validate script, the contract projection (contracts/dms-core-contract.json: section row_counts 10/22/8), and the README CP00-217 section. Section counts (M04:10, M05:22, M06:8 = 40) and deliverable distribution (implementation 14, fixture 14, test 6, hermes_evidence 2, claude_review 2, security_audit 2 = 40) match the prompt baseline exactly. The production_ready claim is NOT overstated: manifest.json and command-evidence.json both record production_ready=false / status implemented_pending_review; the only positive signal is a local-validation production_ready_candidate, and enterprise trust is explicitly not claimed from local validation with human final approval required. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced via freezeCp217Result attestation flags and validator assertions (descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, cross-tenant access denied, unauthorized data omitted, no AI/replay/Hermes-receipt runtime); the validate script contains no write operations and a secret/real-data scan of registry/service/validators found nothing. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer (claude_is_final_approval=false, read_only=true, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob) and is not final approval authority. CP178+ review hardening is encoded in forbidden_review_evidence (auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, plus final-approval/source-mutation/enterprise-trust claim blockers), with missing-required-field rejection enforced by review-schema.json. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this pre-review stage per the hardening sequence. All 18 recorded validation/build commands report exit 0 and git diff --check passes. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified; PASS with no findings.
